Lead Frontend Engineer

I architect frontend systems that scale.

Lead Frontend Engineer with 9+ years building React/Next.js platforms, design systems, and engineering culture at enterprise scale.

Download Resume
About

From contributor
to multiplier.

I've spent 9 years at the intersection of code, architecture, and people. I care about systems that outlast the sprint — reusable, accessible, observable, and maintainable by teams I'll never meet. At GlobalLogic I've moved from writing code to shaping how entire BUs write code. That shift — from contributor to multiplier — is what I'm most proud of.

Systems over features

I'd rather build the right foundation once than patch the same thing five times.

Teams are the product

The best architecture is useless without engineers who understand and own it.

Measure everything

If you can't observe it, you can't improve it.

Impact

Numbers that matter.

0+

years building production systems

0%

faster delivery via shared architecture

0%

reduction in p75 LCP post-migration

0%

cut in SVG processing time

0%

faster engineer onboarding

teams in 24-hour hackathon

0+

engineers mentored across BUs

Experience

8 years of building
things that scale.

GlobalLogic (Hitachi Group)

Associate Consultant, Lead Frontend Engineer

Nov 2023 – PresentNoida
  • Contributed to BU-wide architectural governance: RFP/RFI evaluation, SOW scoping, and frontend workflow design adopted across project teams.
  • Architected shared monorepo platform (Turborepo + Tailwind + ShadCN) with design tokens and WCAG 2.1 AA patterns; adopted across 5+ projects, ~40% delivery improvement.
  • Architected AngularJS → React/Next.js migration using strangler fig pattern; reduced p75 LCP by 35%.
  • Established recurring structured frontend training curriculum; mentored 10+ engineers, reducing onboarding time by 50%.
  • Organised 24-hour hackathon with 22 participating teams.
  • Built SVG generation/printing modules with role-based access and API caching — 60% processing time reduction.

Inadev India Pvt. Ltd.

Senior Software Engineer

Jan 2022 – Nov 2023Noida
  • Led frontend for MaxLife Insurance portal (React, Next.js, Strapi, GraphQL).
  • Optimised caching, state management, and data-fetching — 25% performance improvement.
  • Drove incremental rollout plans reducing release risk.

To The New

Senior Software Engineer

Oct 2020 – Dec 2021Noida
  • Built Tata Sky Smart Home and Subscription platforms (React/Redux).
  • Focused on reusable component architecture and scalable state models.

NetProphets Cyberworks

Software Engineer

Jul 2018 – Sep 2020Noida
  • Campaign dashboards, admin systems, reporting (React, Node.js, PHP).
  • Role-based access, geotagging, exportable reporting.

BizSpice India Pvt. Ltd.

Software Engineer

Jan 2017 – Jun 2018Noida
  • Magento 2 modules and e-commerce features via React/Node integrations.

Architecture & Org Contribution

Impact beyond
the project.

Work that shapes how entire business units build, ship, and grow.

BU-wide Governance

Contributed to RFP/RFI evaluation and SOW scoping across multiple project teams within GlobalLogic's BU. Defined frontend delivery workflows adopted org-wide.

Engineering Standards

Authored coding standards, PR review protocols, and automated quality gates that serve as the baseline for all new project onboarding across the BU.

24-Hour Hackathon

Conceived and ran a 24-hour internal hackathon with 22 participating teams — full end-to-end programme ownership from ideation to execution.

Training Curriculum

Designed and delivered a recurring structured frontend training programme as part of BU L&D. Covers React architecture, performance, and design systems.

Internal Publication

Published engineering blog on frontend scaling practices on the GlobalLogic UI Engineering intranet.

POC Leadership

Leading proof-of-concepts for React Native and module federation to evaluate org-wide adoption feasibility.

Projects & POCs

Proof in the code.

Monorepo Starter Template

A production-ready Turborepo + Next.js + Tailwind + ShadCN monorepo with design token system and automated CI/CD.

Module Federation POC

Proof-of-concept demonstrating Webpack Module Federation with two independently deployed Next.js micro-frontends sharing a component library.
